creator: reed@scit.us
text:
Jeremy Messenger wrote:
> Hey,
> 
> I have solved it long time ago (Aug 3rd) in MarcusCom CVS ports-stable.
> 
> http://www.marcuscom.com:8080/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/ports-stable/www/mozplugger/ 
> 
> 
> Pretty easy to patch it by:
> 
> post-patch:
>     @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|"/etc|"${PREFIX}/etc|g' \
>         ${WRKSRC}/mozplugger.c
> 
> All of that MarcusCom CVS ports-stable stuff will be merging into 
> FreeBSD ports tree when it's complete unfreeze.

Good to know that it was already solved.
